author: codex
scope: Codex-only relation endpoint-shape cleanup prep; no durable retirements, replacement submissions, generated-output commands, provider-backed commands, or generated canonical edits applied

bucket.name: has_treatment claim-to-treatment_component row that should be has_claim treatment_component-to-claim
bucket.cleanup_direction: data cleanup only; keep has_treatment scoped to project|corridor|route -> treatment_component
bucket.rationale: The source supports both a new elevator treatment component at Livonia Av & Rockaway Parkway and a source-stated claim about that elevator. It does not support using the claim as the owner/scope of a has_treatment edge. The existing endpoint rules admit has_claim treatment_component -> claim, preserving the relationship without widening has_treatment.

reported_checkpoint.context: Fresh baseline after next20/relation044/identity076 checkpoint supplied in task.

endpoint_shape_probe.has_treatment claim->treatment_component: Relation kind has_treatment expects project|corridor|route -> treatment_component, got claim -> treatment_component.
endpoint_shape_probe.has_claim treatment_component->claim: accepted by current endpoint-shape rules in packages/pipeline/src/records/relations.ts

excluded_parallel_or_recent_artifacts: relation044 and earlier applied relation cleanup batches

evidence_support_guard.summary: The original relation, accepted claim, accepted treatment component, and canonical records all cite page 13 blocks from meeting_doc_109976. The p013_c0001 block describes the elevator/signage at Livonia Av & Rockaway Parkway and includes the source-stated claim text; p013_c0003 gives the accessibility context. Reusing these evidence refs is justified because the replacement preserves the same source-backed relationship while correcting kind/direction.

no_generated_canonical_files_edited_guar.note: The shared worktree already had generated-output edits before this prep. This task only adds data/review_notes/codex-relation-cleanup-batch046-prep.json and does not edit canonical JSONL, canonical DB, materialized data, or wiki output.

retire_only_fallback.not_selected_reason: Replacement is safe: both endpoints already exist as accepted same-source observations, the replacement relation has direct copied evidence, and has_claim treatment_component -> claim is valid under current endpoint rules.

local_validation.tooling: Read-only jq/rg inspection plus bun --eval createSubmissionEntry dry-run using direct source imports; no appendSubmission, materialize, export-jsonl, full validate, DB publish, provider-backed command, or generated-output command run.
